drug_sensitivity.description: Baseline drug sensitivity multiplier; varies across population (lognormal distribution)

IC50_5FU.description: Half-maximal inhibitory concentration for 5-FU in CRC cells (micromolar); literature range 5-50 uM

ALDH_expression.description: ALDH1 enzyme level; metabolises 5-FU to inactive 5-FUH2

TS_expression.description: Thymidylate synthase (5-FU target); lower in CSCs reduces targeting

cumulative_drug_exposure.description: Total 5-FU concentration × time integral; triggers ABC transporter upregulation

quiescent_state.description: G0 quiescence flag; 1=dormant (resistant to all drugs); 0=cycling

ALDH_expression.description: ALDH1 enzyme level; metabolises 5-FU to inactive 5-FUH2

TS_expression.description: Thymidylate synthase (5-FU target); lower in CSCs reduces targeting

cumulative_drug_exposure.description: Total 5-FU concentration × time integral; triggers ABC transporter upregulation

quiescent_state.description: G0 quiescence flag; 1=dormant (resistant to all drugs); 0=cycling
